title: helianthemum apenninum subsp. rothmaleri
intro: Helianthemum apenninum subsp. rothmaleri, also known as alpine rockrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum apenninum subsp. rothmaleri include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce anxiety and stress, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to promote wound healing and alleviate symptoms of skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
